name: report_seu
short_description: Display all the SEEP changes on the device
full_help:
report_seu

Description: 
Display all the SEEP changes on the device

Syntax: 
report_seu  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-return_string] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
Report

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-file]           Filename to output results to. Send output to console if 
                    -file is not used.
  [-append]         Append to existing file
  [-return_string]  Return report as string
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Filename to output results to. Send output to console if
Suspend message limits during command execution
